query_to_ask: Check the data quality of my StepWell footwear wholesale dataset and clean it up.
expected_output_keywords: missing values, outlier capping, duplicate removal, quality_score
validation_notes: ~5% missing order_quantity, ~3% missing price/stock, ~3% outlier spikes (4-5x), 9 duplicate rows. Quality score should be >= 70 after cleaning.

query_to_ask: Profile the dataset — what's the average order quantity and price for each footwear product?
validation_notes: Relaxo Hawai Slippers should show by far the highest mean order_quantity (~120-130/day base), being a daily-essential high-volume item. Sparx Running Shoes should have the highest unit price (~620-680).

query_to_ask: Compare order trends for Sparx Running Shoes, Bata Comfit Sandals, and Action Formal Leather Shoes. Which product is losing demand?
validation_notes: Action Formal Leather Shoes has a built-in -28% decline (post-pandemic shift away from formal wear). Sparx should show 'increasing' (+45%, sports trend). Bata Comfit Sandals should be roughly stable.

query_to_ask: Which distribution region — North, South, or West — orders the most footwear?
expected_output_keywords: region-level totals via sql_query, roughly even
validation_notes: All 3 regions use identical generation logic, so totals should be close to equal (~33% each). Tests if the agent avoids overclaiming a 'best region' from random noise.

query_to_ask: Is there a seasonal spike for Liberty Force-10 School Shoes? When does it happen?
expected_output_keywords: spike detected around April 15 - June 15, peak near May 20
validation_notes: Liberty Force-10 School Shoes has a gaussian seasonal bump peaking May 20 reaching up to ~3x baseline (school admission season). The season_event column is explicitly labeled 'School Admission Season' for that window — TrendAnalyst should be able to correlate the spike with this label via sql_query.

query_to_ask: Forecast order quantity for Liberty Force-10 School Shoes for the next 30 days. Should I prepare for a demand surge?
expected_output_keywords: 30-day forecast capturing tail of seasonal bump
validation_notes: Since the dataset ends June 28 (school season window is Apr15-Jun15), the forecast window starts just after the peak has begun decaying. Prophet should still show elevated values relative to the Jan-Mar baseline, and ideally detect this as a seasonal/yearly-adjacent pattern if cmdstanpy converges well.

query_to_ask: Predict order volume for Relaxo Hawai Slippers over the next 30 days — this is our highest-volume staple item.
validation_notes: Relaxo Hawai Slippers has ~0% trend (stable) but DOES have a strong weekday/weekend B2B pattern (orders dip ~35% on weekends). FFT-based seasonality detection in Forecaster should flag weekly_seasonality=true.

query_to_ask: What reorder point and order quantity should I set for Sparx Running Shoes given its growing demand?
validation_notes: Because Sparx demand is growing, MCTS should recommend a HIGHER reorder point and order quantity than a stable product like Bata Comfit Sandals, to keep pace with rising B2B orders.

query_to_ask: Optimize inventory for Action Formal Leather Shoes with a low stockout cost of 20 and holding cost of 8 — we'd rather reduce excess stock since this category is declining.
expected_output_keywords: lower order_quantity, smaller safety stock vs default params
validation_notes: Custom parameter test: holding_cost=8 (default 5) and stockout_cost=20 (default 50) should push MCTS toward a leaner inventory policy — appropriate given the declining trend (-28%) for this product.

query_to_ask: Show me a bar chart of total order quantity by region for Bata Comfit Sandals.
validation_notes: Bata Comfit Sandals has no regional bias built into the generator, so the 3 bars should be roughly equal height.

query_to_ask: Visualize the seasonal spike pattern for Liberty Force-10 School Shoes across the year.
expected_output_keywords: chart_type: line, visible bump around April-June
validation_notes: Line chart should visibly show the bell-curve-shaped demand spike for Liberty shoes peaking mid-to-late May.

query_to_ask: Draft a bulk purchase order for Sparx Running Shoes for the South region for the upcoming quarter.
validation_notes: OrderManager output is unstructured text. Verify the response references bulk/wholesale quantities given this is a B2B distributor context, not a retail order.

query_to_ask: Our warehouse stock for Action Formal Leather Shoes just hit zero. What should we order immediately?
expected_output_keywords: maximum order recommendation despite declining trend
validation_notes: Tests MCTS InventoryState with zero current stock. Even though Action Formal Leather Shoes is declining, a zero-stock state with nonzero stockout_cost should still trigger an immediate reorder recommendation — testing whether MCTS balances 'declining trend' against 'currently zero stock'.

query_to_ask: What's the best time to launch a new sneaker line based on this data?
expected_output_keywords: speculative recommendation grounded in seasonal patterns (e.g. avoid school season, target Republic Day/Holi)
validation_notes: This is a strategic/speculative question with no exact answer in the data. TrendAnalyst should reason from observed sale-event boosts (Republic Day +20%, Holi +25%) rather than fabricating a specific 'best date' with false precision.

query_to_ask: Give me a complete end-to-end analysis for Liberty Force-10 School Shoes: clean the data, analyze the seasonal trend, forecast the next 30 days, optimize reorder point and bulk order quantity ahead of school season, visualize the demand curve, draft a bulk purchase order, and notify me on Discord once it's ready.
expected_agents_triggered: data_harvester + trend_analyst + forecaster + mcts_optimizer + visualizer + order_manager + notifier
expected_output_keywords: full pipeline anchored on the strongest seasonal product in the dataset
validation_notes: Liberty Force-10 is the best test case for the full pipeline because its seasonal spike (up to 3x) should visibly propagate through TrendAnalyst -> Forecaster -> MCTSOptimizer's demand scaling logic. Verify SharedContext findings show 'increasing' or seasonal trend_direction.

query_to_ask: Run a full supply chain optimization for Sparx Running Shoes: clean data, find trends, forecast 30 days, optimize inventory to capture the growth trend, show me a chart, draft an order for the West region, and alert me when complete.
expected_agents_triggered: data_harvester + trend_analyst + forecaster + mcts_optimizer + visualizer + order_manager + notifier
validation_notes: Sparx has the strongest organic (non-seasonal) growth trend (+45%). This tests the full chain on a steadily-growing product rather than an event-driven spike product like Liberty shoes.

query_to_ask: I want everything on Action Formal Leather Shoes before we decide whether to discontinue it: data quality check, trend analysis, a 30-day forecast, inventory optimization to minimize holding costs, a visualization of the decline, a minimal purchase order, and a Discord alert.
expected_agents_triggered: data_harvester + trend_analyst + forecaster + mcts_optimizer + visualizer + order_manager + notifier
expected_output_keywords: declining-product full pipeline, minimized order recommendation
validation_notes: Tests the full pipeline's behavior on a genuinely declining product (-28%). Expect conservative/minimal order_quantity from MCTS and a 'decreasing' trend_direction propagated from TrendAnalyst through to Forecaster's interpretation.

query_to_ask: Give me a full deep-dive across the entire StepWell business: clean all data, analyze trends across all regions and products, forecast next month's overall demand, optimize inventory policy, visualize total order volume, generate a consolidated bulk order, and notify me on Discord.
expected_agents_triggered: data_harvester + trend_analyst + forecaster + mcts_optimizer + visualizer + order_manager + notifier
expected_output_keywords: business-wide full pipeline (no single product filter)
validation_notes: Broadest test — no product filter, so MCTSOptimizer's _extract_demand() must correctly pick 'order_quantity' as the demand column across the entire 5-product, 3-region dataset.

query_to_ask: For Bata Comfit Sandals, give me the full picture: clean the dataset, trend and weekly seasonality analysis, a 45-day forecast, reorder point and order quantity optimization with a stockout cost of 100, a trend chart, a draft purchase order, and a completion notification.
expected_agents_triggered: data_harvester + trend_analyst + forecaster + mcts_optimizer + visualizer + order_manager + notifier
expected_output_keywords: 45-day horizon, custom stockout_cost=100, stable-product full pipeline baseline
validation_notes: Bata Comfit Sandals is the 'stable/control' product (0% trend, no seasonal spike) — useful as a baseline full-pipeline run to compare against the seasonal/growth/decline products in F15-F18.
